next_steps: Whole-body 18F-FDG PET-CT to identify systemic metabolic activity
Image-guided core needle biopsy of the retroperitoneal or mediastinal soft tissue for histopathology and immunohistochemistry (including CD68, CD1a, and IgG4 staining)
Serum IgG subclass quantification and ANA/ANCA/complement testing
Endocrine evaluation for diabetes insipidus given polydipsia and polyuria (serum/urine osmolality and electrolytes)
Formal cardiac consultation for management of persistent arrhythmia and pericardial involvement
Consultation with rheumatology and pathology to integrate multisystem findings
Image-guided core needle biopsy of retroperitoneal or mediastinal tissue for immunohistochemistry (CD68, CD1a, S100, IgG4, BRAF V600E)
Evaluation for diabetes insipidus (serum/urine osmolality, electrolytes, water deprivation test if indicated)
Skeletal imaging (plain films or MRI of long bones) to assess for bilateral osteosclerosis
Cardiac consultation for management of arrhythmia and risk of pericardial constriction
